Best,
SG Services Growth Team

intent: Reject a candidate politely after a final interview

Decision was very close
Company will keep his profile on file
Encourage him to apply for future roles
reference_email:
Subject: Your Application – Account Executive Role

Dear James,

Thank you for the time and effort you invested throughout the interview process for the Account Executive position. It was genuinely a pleasure getting to know you.

After careful consideration, we have decided to move forward with another candidate. This was an extremely close decision and in no way reflects a lack of talent or potential on your part.

We were impressed by your profile and would very much like to keep your details on file for future opportunities. We would encourage you to apply for any roles that align with your goals.

We wish you every success in your career and hope our paths cross again.

Kind regards,
SG Services Recruitment Team
